# copick training

*Train a model with copick data.*

## Usage

```bash
copick training [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## Description

Commands in this group train machine-learning models on annotated copick
data. Subcommands are contributed by installed plugins.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
